debug_info.goal:
A : Type u_1
inst✝² : CommRing A
inst✝¹ : IsDomain A
inst✝ : @IsKrullDomain A inst✝² inst✝¹
⊢ IsIntegrallyClosed A

failed_attempts:
by_contra h_not_integrally_closed
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : ∃ x : FractionRing A, IsIntegral A x ∧ x ∉ Set.range (algebraMap A (FractionRing A)) := by
    contrapose! h_not_integrally_closed with h_integrally_closed
    constructor
    · exact IsFractionRing.injective A (FractionRing A)
    · exact fun { x } => ⟨fun hx => h_integrally_closed x hx, fun ⟨y, hy⟩ => hy ▸ isIntegral_algebraMap⟩
  have hx_in_localizations : ∀ p : PrimeSpectrum A, p.1.primeHeight = 1 → x ∈ (Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors) := by
    intro p hp
    have hx_local : IsIntegral (Localization p.1.primeCompl) x := by
      obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := hx.1
      refine' ⟨f.map (algebraMap A (Localization p.asIdeal.primeCompl)), _, _⟩
      · exact hf.1.map _
      · simp_all +decide [Polynomial.eval₂_map]
        convert hf.2 using 1
        congr! 2
        ext; simp +decide [Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one]
    have hx_local_closed : IsIntegrallyClosed (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := by
      have := ‹IsKrullDomain A›.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization p hp
      infer_instance
    convert hx_local_closed.isIntegral_iff.mp hx_local
    simp +decide [Localization.subalgebra]
    simp +decide [Localization.mapToFractionRing, SetLike.ext_iff]
    constructor <;> rintro ⟨y, hy⟩
    · obtain ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩ := hy
      refine' ⟨Localization.mk y ⟨s, hs⟩, _⟩
      simp +decide [Localization.mk_eq_mk', div_eq_mul_inv]
      erw [IsLocalization.lift_mk']; aesop
    · obtain ⟨a, s, hs, rfl⟩ := IsLocalization.mk'_surjective p.asIdeal.primeCompl y
      refine' ⟨a.1, a.2, a.2.2, _⟩
      convert hy.symm using 1
      erw [IsLocalization.lift_mk']; aesop
  have hx_in_inf : x ∈ ⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}, Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors := by
    aesop
  have hx_in_bot : x ∈ (⊥ : Subalgebra A (FractionRing A)) := by
    convert hx_in_inf using 1
    convert (IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot A).symm using 1
  exact hx.2 (by rcases hx_in_bot with ⟨y, rfl⟩; exact ⟨y, rfl⟩)
